claim.alreadyClaimedDescription: {name} already has a verified owner on Palato. If you think this is a mistake, contact support.
claim.needAccountDescription: To claim a listing you need to be signed in. The claim is tied to your user so we can contact you if we ask for extra evidence.
claim.successDomainEmail: We sent (or will send shortly) a verification link to the email you provided. Click it and your listing gets verified instantly.
claim.successManual: A Palato admin will review your evidence and email you when we approve or need more.
claim.intro: If you're the owner or manager, claim the listing to reply to reviews, upload official photos, and keep info up to date. Only one owner is approved per restaurant; the data is recorded for audit.
claim.verifyHowLegend: How do you want to verify?
claim.methodDomainHint: The email must belong to the restaurant's domain (e.g. owner@thekitchen.com). We send you a verification link that approves the claim automatically.
claim.methodGoogleHint: Upload a screenshot of your Google Business dashboard as evidence. An admin reviews the case.
claim.methodPhoneHint: We call the restaurant's phone we already have on file with a code. An admin validates the call.
claim.methodManualHint: Upload any other proof (invoice with the restaurant name, photo of the sign) and an admin reviews it manually.
claim.contactEmailGenericPlaceholder: How we contact you if we ask for more info
claim.evidenceHint: One URL per line: photo of the sign, invoice, Google dashboard, any proof that helps the admin validate.
claim.errorConflict: You already have an open claim for this place, or it already has a verified owner.
claim.errorBadRequest: Missing data: the domain email is required for that option.
claim.errorRateLimit: You hit the daily claim limit. Try tomorrow.
claim.errorGeneric: Couldn't create the claim. Try again in a few minutes.

search.title: Search

about.tagline: The question was never «is it a good place?» but «what should I order?».
about.ruleBody: No opaque algorithms, no inflated stars, no sponsored reviews. What you tasted, told the way you'd tell a friend.

pillars.dishBody: A restaurant can be a mix of hits and misses. A milanesa is not. A milanesa is either good or it isn't. Palato indexes by dish — because when you order, that's all that matters.
pillars.reviewBody: Texture, doneness, portion, price. The voice of someone who already ordered. No emotional asides, no decorative emojis: what you ate, how it was, whether you'd come back.
pillars.communityBody: You follow people whose taste matches yours. You save what you want to try. Your wishlist is a map of the city written by people who eat.

specialty.toneBalanced: balanced palate, neither forgives nor gifts.
specialty.toneHonest: honest palate, doesn't give stars away.

map.previewGeekScoreTooltip: Bayesian combination of technical execution (45%), value (25%), presentation (15%) and stars (15%) of the venue's best dish. The higher, the better it ranks among critics.
map.previewChefBadgeRowDescription: Outstanding technical execution — at least one dish averaging ≥ 2.7 out of 3, validated by multiple reviews. The kitchen craft seal.
map.previewGemBadgeRowDescription: Outstanding value — you pay fair for what you get. The hidden gem of the venue according to several critics.

restaurantsIndex.title: Restaurants
restaurantsIndex.description: We'll list all the venues we've visited here. This section is still being built.

mapa.title: Map
mapa.subtitle: Explore dishes and restaurants geographically. Filter by score, review volume, or zoom into a neighborhood.

preferences.heading: My preferences
preferences.subtitle: Tune how the Sommelier knows you and talks to you.
preferences.signInPrompt: Sign in to edit your preferences.

errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load your preferences. Try again in a bit.
errors.saveFailed: Couldn't save the changes. Try again.

chat.heading: Chat preferences
chat.subtitle: How you want the Sommelier to reply in future sessions.

taste.heading: Your tastes
taste.subtitle: What Palato knows about you. Some fields we infer from your reviews; others you can declare here.
taste.inferredHint: The fields above update automatically with your reviews; you can't edit them here.
taste.allergiesHint: Comma-separated. The Sommelier will respect these in every recommendation.

privacy.heading: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Manage users you've muted or blocked. You can undo any action at any time.
privacy.emptyBlockedDescription: When you block someone they show up here. Blocking is two-way: neither side sees the other.
privacy.emptyMutedDescription: Muting is silent: the other person won't know. You stop seeing their content and notifications.
privacy.errorGeneric: Try again in a few seconds.
privacy.anonDescription: You need an account to manage blocks and mutes.

chat.title: Palato Sommelier
chat.attachInvalidType: Only images are supported (JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC).
chat.attachTooBig: That photo is over 8 MB. Try a smaller one.
chat.attachUploadError: We couldn't upload the photo. Try again in a moment.
chat.greetingNamed: Hi {name}, what are you in the mood for?
chat.greetingAnon: Tell me what you're craving and I'll suggest a dish.
chat.emptyState: Try: "find me a 3/3 bargain in Palermo with stunning presentation".

businessEmpty.subtitle: Tell me what you want to see about your restaurant.

pending.label: Unanswered reviews
pending.message: Which reviews haven't I replied to yet?

summary.label: Month summary
summary.message: Give me a quick summary of how the month is going.

negatives.label: Negative reviews
negatives.message: Show me my pending negative reviews.

benchmark.label: Vs competition
benchmark.message: How does my rating compare to nearby competition?

sommelierEmpty.subtitle: Tell me what you're craving and I'll suggest dishes for you.
sommelierEmpty.anonInvite: Sign in so we can remember your tastes across conversations.

gangaInNeighborhood.label: A great deal in {neighborhood}
gangaInNeighborhood.message: Find me a great deal in {neighborhood}.

greatDeal.label: A great deal nearby
greatDeal.message: Find me a great deal nearby.

firstDate.label: Something for a first date
firstDate.message: Recommend something for a first date.

mapCard.title: View on the map
mapCard.subtitle: Open the map with the suggested places.

tools.searchEmpty: No dishes match those filters. Try loosening one.
tools.profileUpdated: Noted your preferences for future recommendations.

ghostwriter.label: Ghostwriter
ghostwriter.uploadPrompt: Upload a photo of the dish and we'll suggest tags, pros, cons and an editorial line.
ghostwriter.errorGeneric: We couldn't analyze the photo. Try a different one.
ghostwriter.appliedHelper: Edit or remove anything that doesn't fit from the form fields.

lists.metaDescription: A curated route of {count} dishes on Palato.
